genre_refs: Truth Social / X post screenshot card
description: A designed graphic styled as a clean, enlarged social-media post card on a white background. At top left is a circular avatar showing a stylized portrait of Donald Trump's face overprinted with the American flag (red/white stripes and blue field over the features). Next to it in bold black text is 'Donald J. Trump' followed by a pink/magenta verified checkmark badge and a small dark square app icon, with the gray handle '@realDonaldTrump' beneath. The body, in large black sans-serif, reads: 'For Iran, the Clock is Ticking, and they better get moving, FAST, or there won't be anything left of them. TIME IS OF THE ESSENCE! President DJT'. The format imitates a quote-card/screenshot of a Trump Truth Social post, repackaged by the Rapid Response 47 war-room account for amplification. Propaganda technique: foreign-policy intimidation/strength messaging via a sharable presidential-quote card. Target audience: supporters and the broader public, signaling toughness toward Iran.
notable_text: Donald J. Trump @realDonaldTrump — For Iran, the Clock is Ticking, and they better get moving, FAST, or there won't be anything left of them. TIME IS OF THE ESSENCE! President DJT
